verification_gate: Headless offscreen render of the twin scene at >30 FPS on the 2x RTX 5090; repeated seeded run is bit-exact deterministic.

gate_result.verified_on: manufacturer-spec workstation twin (owner insight: use vendor specs for known hardware) via Genesis/torch on RTX 5090

reference_verification.genesis_first_decision: RuView ADR-147: Genesis over NVIDIA Cosmos (VRAM headroom on 2x RTX 5090 32GB)

proof_summary: LPS-036: Genesis builds the manufacturer-spec workstation twin as a rigid-body scene on the RTX 5090 (sm_120, torch 2.11.0+cu128) and runs headless offscreen at ~1520 FPS (>30 FPS gate); a repeated seeded run is bit-exact deterministic (identical state fingerprint). Genesis runs the 15-component exact-hardware twin headless on the RTX 5090 at 177.4 FPS (>30 gate), bit-exact deterministic. Canonical GPU stack: Candle (Rust) + cuda-oxide + CUDA 13.3 on 2x RTX 5090; see rust_gpu_toolchain.json.
